Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: What fortunate timing this is, because I have made a ... erm, I fear I have been utterly insensé as of late.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: I started baking and baking, and could not stop myself. I must have made like three rounds of baguettes before I realised, « who are you going to share this with, you crétin ? »

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: I put them out here for everyone to enjoy if they wish, but no one ever comes up.

Line.Text: Business Kweebec passes through sometimes, but that is très rare. I would not dream of interrupting someone that occupée, anyway.
